MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Linda Drew's Motion For Preliminary Approval of Class Action Settlement (Transferred From Dept. 301, Per Challenge To Judge Busch). Appearances: Eric A. Grover, Esq. of Keller Grover LLP (415) 543-1305 appearing for Plaintiff and moving party; Arthur M. Eidelhoch, Esq. of Littler Mendelson P.C. (415) 677-3152 appearing for Defendants. The Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for Preliminary Approval of Class Action Settlement is granted.
